hero.title: Cancellation Policy
hero.subtitle: Clear information for your security and planning.

sectionPolicy.title: Our Policy in Detail
sectionPolicy.intro: To ensure transparency, we detail the applicable conditions. We recommend careful reading.

sections.title: General Conditions
points: All requests must be made in writing via email.
Calculation is based on the date of receipt of the request.
Service and administrative fees are non-refundable.

sections.title: Deadlines and Fees (Land Packages)
points: Cancellation more than 30 days in advance: 20% retention fee.
Cancellation between 29 and 15 days: 50% retention fee.
Cancellation less than 14 days: No refund.

sections.title: Flights
points: Flight cancellation policies are dictated by airlines and may be 100% non-refundable.

important.title: Important
important.description: In case of cancellation due to force majeure (pandemic, natural disasters, etc.), special conditions apply. Contact us for more information.

steps.title: 1. Contact Support
steps.description: The fastest and safest way is through the official support email.

steps.title: 2. Provide Details
steps.description: Please indicate your booking number, full name and reason for cancellation.

steps.title: 3. Wait for Confirmation
steps.description: You will receive an email confirmation with processing details.

questions.q: Can I cancel my booking online?
questions.a: Currently, all cancellations must be processed through our email support to ensure security and accuracy.

questions.q: How long does the refund take?
questions.a: Refunds are processed within 5 to 10 business days after cancellation confirmation, depending on the original payment method.

questions.q: Can I change instead of cancel?
questions.a: Yes! It's often possible to change dates or destinations. Contact us to check available options for your booking.

needHelp.title: Need Help?
needHelp.description: Our team is here to help you with any questions about cancellations.

contactSupport.title: Contact Support
contactSupport.description: For cancellations or questions, contact us directly.

myBookings.title: My Bookings
myBookings.description: Access your personal area to see all your bookings.

refundTimeline.title: Refund Timeline
refundTimeline.description: See the table above to understand the applicable fees according to the cancellation period.

ui.howToHint: The process is simple and automatic through your customer area.

preferences.title: Cookie Preferences
preferences.description: We respect your privacy. You can adjust your settings at any time to control what you share with us.
preferences.cardDescription: Control how your data is used.
preferences.necessaryDesc: These cookies are essential for the website to work and cannot be disabled.
preferences.functionalDesc: Enable enhanced functionality and personalization (e.g., remember preferences).
preferences.analyticsDesc: Help us measure and improve website performance using aggregated statistics.
preferences.marketingDesc: Used to deliver content and ads that are more relevant to you.

sections.title: 1. What are Cookies?
content: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work, or work more efficiently, as well as to provide information to the site owners.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Cookies
content: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience, personalize content and ads, provide social media features, and analyze our traffic. We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising, and analytics partners.

sections.title: 3. Types of Cookies We Use
content:
• Essential Cookies: Necessary for the basic functionality of the site.
  • Performance Cookies: Collect information about how visitors use the website.
  • Functionality Cookies: Allow the site to remember choices you make.
  • Advertising Cookies: Used to deliver ads more relevant to you.

sections.title: 4. Managing Cookies
content: You can control and/or delete cookies as you wish. However, if you do this, you may have to manually adjust some preferences every time you visit a site and some services may not work.

header.title: Privacy Policy & Data Protection
header.subtitle: Full transparency on how AKMLEVA processes your personal data in compliance with the GDPR

introduction.title: Our privacy policy
introduction.intro: AKMLEVA is fully committed to protecting your privacy and personal data, in strict compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR/EU 2016/679) and applicable legislation.

footer.statementPrefix: This document is fully compliant with
footer.trustLine: Commitment to transparency and protection of your rights

dataProcessing.title: Purposes of Personal Data Processing
dataProcessing.intro: We process your personal data only for specific, explicit and legitimate purposes, in compliance with the GDPR.

purposes.title: Service Provision and Booking Management
purposes.description: Process travel bookings, accommodation, transportation and tourist activities, manage payments, issue travel documents and provide customer support during and after the trip.

purposes.title: Compliance with Legal Obligations
purposes.description: Comply with tax, accounting and regulatory obligations, keep invoices and travel records for legal reasons.

purposes.title: Marketing and Personalized Communication
purposes.description: Send newsletters, promotions, personalized offers, satisfaction surveys and information about destinations similar to those previously booked.

purposes.title: Fraud Prevention and Security
purposes.description: Verify identity for bookings, prevent payment fraud, detect suspicious activities and protect systems and customer data.

purposes.title: Service Improvement and Statistical Analysis
purposes.description: Analyze usage patterns, travel preferences and feedback to improve services, personalize offers and perform aggregated market studies.

dataProcessing.note: We do not process your data for purposes incompatible with those described here without a new legal basis or your explicit consent.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security Measures
dataSecurity.intro: We adopt appropriate and up-to-date technical and organizational measures to ensure a level of security proportional to the risk, in compliance with Article 32 of the GDPR.

measures.text: TLS 1.3 encryption in transit and AES-256 at rest (databases and backups)
Multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all administrative access and critical systems
Role-based access control (RBAC) and least privilege principle
Real-time monitoring, intrusion detection (IDS/IPS) and audit logs
Mandatory annual training in data protection and cybersecurity for all employees
Independent security audits and periodic penetration testing
Incident response and disaster recovery plans regularly tested

dataSecurity.note: Despite the measures implemented, no system is 100% immune to risk. In case of a data breach, we will notify the supervisory authority and affected data subjects within the legal time limits.

dataTypes.title: Types of Personal Data Collected
dataTypes.intro: We collect only the data strictly necessary to provide contracted services and comply with legal obligations.

categories.retention: 3 years after last interaction or withdrawal of consent

examples: Payment info (last 4 digits, IBAN for transfers)

categories.retention: up to 26 months (or less if withdrawn)
until consent withdrawal or 3 years after inactivity

dataTypes.note: Retention periods may be longer when required by law or shorter in case of exercising data subject rights.
dataTypes.mobileHint: Swipe to the right to see the full examples

dataCategories.title: Categories of Personal Data Processed
dataCategories.mobileHint: Swipe horizontally to see all examples

userRights.title: Your Rights as a Data Subject
userRights.intro: The GDPR grants you several powerful rights over your personal data. You can exercise them at any time by contacting us using the details in the “Data Controller” section.

items.description: You may request confirmation that we process your personal data and obtain a copy, including purposes, categories, recipients and retention periods.
You may request the immediate correction of inaccurate or incomplete personal data.

items.right: Right to Erasure (Right to be Forgotten)
items.description: You may request deletion of your personal data when it is no longer necessary, when you withdraw consent, or in other cases provided by the GDPR.
You may request temporary suspension of processing in certain circumstances (e.g., while verifying data accuracy or when you object to processing).
You may receive your personal data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format and transmit it to another controller when processing is based on consent or contract.
You may object to processing for direct marketing at any time, or for reasons related to your particular situation in cases of legitimate interest.

items.right: Right Not to be Subject to Automated Decisions
items.description: You have the right not to be subject to decisions based solely on automated processing, including profiling, that produce legal effects or similarly significantly affect you.

footer.prefix: To exercise any of these rights, just contact us via email
footer.suffix: . We will respond within one month (extendable in complex cases).

contact.title: Contact and Exercise of GDPR Rights
contact.intro: To exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection, portability, restriction) or clarify any questions about processing your personal data, contact us through the channels below:
contact.note: We will respond as soon as possible and always within the legal deadlines provided by the GDPR.

userRights.description: You can request information about the personal data we process about you.
You can request the correction of incorrect or incomplete personal data.
You can request the deletion of your personal data in certain circumstances.
You can request the restriction of processing of your personal data.
You can request the transfer of your data to another service provider.
You can object to the processing of your personal data in certain situations.
You can withdraw your consent at any time, where applicable.
You can lodge a complaint with the National Data Protection Commission (CNPD).

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
measures: Data encryption in transit and at rest (SSL/TLS)
Role-based access control and multi-factor authentication
Continuous security monitoring and intrusion detection
Regular employee training on data protection
Periodic security audits and impact assessments
Secure backup and disaster recovery plans
Pseudonymization and data minimization wherever possible

dataTransfers.title: International Data Transfers
dataTransfers.content: When necessary for the provision of our services, we may transfer your data to countries outside the European Economic Area (EEA).
safeguards: Standard contractual clauses approved by the European Commission
Approved codes of conduct and certification mechanisms
Continuous evaluation of protection levels in destination countries

cookies.title: Cookies and Similar Technologies
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience on our website. For more detailed information on the use of cookies, see our Cookie Policy.

contact.title: Contact and Exercise of Rights
contact.content: To exercise any of your rights under the GDPR or clarify questions about the processing of your personal data, you can contact us through the following means:

ui.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use and protect your personal information when you use our website and services. By using AKMLEVA, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.

introduction.title: Introduction
content: At AKMLEVA, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our travel services.
This policy complies with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and Portuguese data protection legislation.

sections.title: 1. Data Collection
content: We collect the following types of personal data:

• Identification Data: Name, email, phone, address, date of birth
  • Travel Data: Destination preferences, travel dates, special requirements
  • Payment Data: Credit card information, billing address (processed securely)
  • Behavioral Data: Website interactions, search preferences, service usage

sections.title: 2. AI Usage and Data Processing
content: We use artificial intelligence to enhance your experience:

• Personalized Recommendations: AI analyzes your preferences to suggest relevant destinations and activities
  • Dynamic Pricing: Algorithms optimize prices based on demand and availability
  • Predictive Analytics: AI helps predict your travel needs and preferences
  • Customer Support: Chatbots provide initial assistance and route complex queries to human agents
All AI processing is designed to improve your experience while maintaining data privacy and security.

sections.title: 3. Data Sharing
content: We may share your data with:

• Travel Partners: Hotels, airlines, and activity providers to fulfill your bookings
  • Payment Processors: Secure payment platforms to process transactions
  • Technology Partners: AI and analytics providers (with anonymized data when possible)
  • Legal Authorities: When required by law or to protect our rights
We never sell your personal data to third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.title: 4. Your Rights
content: Under GDPR, you have the following rights:

• Access: Request a copy of your personal data
  • Rectification: Correct inaccurate or incomplete data
  • Erasure: Request deletion of your data (right to be forgotten)
  • Portability: Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
  • Objection: Object to processing based on legitimate interests
  • Restriction: Limit how we process your data
To exercise these rights, contact us at: geral@akmleva.pt

introduction.title: Introduction
content: Welcome to AKMLEVA, your trusted travel agency. These general terms and conditions govern the use of our services and establish the rights and obligations between AKMLEVA and our clients.
By using our services, you agree to comply with these terms. We recommend that you read them carefully before making any reservation.

sections.title: 1. Object
content: AKMLEVA is a travel agency registered in Portugal, specializing in organizing personalized trips and tourist experiences.
Our services include trip planning, accommodation booking, transportation, tourist activities, and comprehensive travel support.

sections.title: 2. AI Usage in Our Services
content: AKMLEVA uses artificial intelligence technology to enhance your travel experience:

• Personalized Recommendations: Our AI analyzes your preferences to suggest destinations and activities.
  • Dynamic Pricing: AI algorithms help us offer competitive and fair prices.
  • Customer Support: AI-powered chatbots provide 24/7 initial assistance.
  • Trip Optimization: AI helps create efficient itineraries based on your interests and time.
All AI decisions are supervised by our human experts to ensure quality and personalization.

sections.title: 3. Booking Process
content: Consultation: Initial contact to understand your needs and preferences.
Proposal: Presentation of a personalized travel proposal.
Confirmation: Booking confirmation after payment of deposit.
Documentation: Provision of all necessary travel documents.

sections.title: 4. Cancellations and Changes
content: By the Client:

• More than 30 days before departure: 20% retention fee
  • Between 30 and 15 days: 50% retention fee
  • Less than 15 days: 100% retention fee
By AKMLEVA: Full refund or rescheduling without additional costs.

sections.title: 5. Responsibilities
content: AKMLEVA Responsibilities:

• Provide services as described in the contract
  • Ensure quality and safety of recommended services
  • Provide support during the trip
  • Maintain confidentiality of client data
Client Responsibilities:

• Provide accurate and complete information
  • Comply with payment deadlines
  • Have valid documentation for travel
  • Follow local laws and customs of destinations

sections.title: 6. Personal Data Protection
content: AKMLEVA is committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with GDPR and Portuguese legislation.
Your data is used exclusively for providing travel services and improving our offerings.
